title: 7 Herbal Tinctures For Emphysema
description: Astragalus membranaceus tinctures contains saponins, flavonoids, and polysaccharides, which are powerful compounds that help fight inflammation and boost the immune system. The saponins, specifically astragaloside IV and III, have been shown to increase the production of surfactant in the lungs, making it easier to breathe for people with emphysema. The flavonoids, including astragaloside II and IV, have anti-inflammatory properties that reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, ma...
